codeReview.summary: Current HEAD satisfies the helper-convergence fix contract. The repair loop in `src/services/candle-store.ts` now only marks a gap start exhausted after a fetch makes zero progress, so narrowed gaps are retried until closed or genuinely exhausted. The updated partial-window test clears preseeded bitcoin canonical candles, exercises the exact 19/4, 20/1, 22/1 fetch sequence, proves four candles are repaired into a contiguous 2026-03-18..2026-03-23 range, and confirms `detectOhlcvGaps(...)` returns an empty array.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The core-api-worker skill still pushes manual HTTP verification even for internal helper/test-only durability fixes that change no route behavior, which caused repeated low-value curl work across the original failure and this fix feature.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: `.factory/skills/core-api-worker/SKILL.md` step 7 requires starting the API and curling endpoints; the fix handoff for session `03f85aef-08bc-4533-a6db-a026ccdce1da` records `/ping` and `/coins/bitcoin/ohlc?...` checks even though the actual behavior under review lives in `src/services/candle-store.ts` and `tests/ohlcv-gap-repair.test.ts`. Prior synthesis already noted the same mismatch for this helper-level scrutiny thread.

summary: Reviewed mission metadata, prior scrutiny synthesis/reviews, the worker handoff/transcript, commit `da928c1`, and current HEAD helper/test implementations. The previous blocking issue is resolved on current HEAD: helper repair convergence now retries narrowed interior gaps correctly, and the rewritten partial-window test provides the requested closure proof with a final gap-free re-scan.
